subject: Update /ticket Phase 7.6 to log review outcomes
description:
**Priority**: HIGH
**Agent**: go-pro (or direct edit)
**File**: .claude/skills/ticket/SKILL.md

Track review outcome when ticket completes after code review.

**Requirements**:
1. Update Phase 7.6 to store review finding IDs:

```bash
# After review completes, store finding IDs for outcome tracking
finding_ids=$(jq -r '.finding_ids[]' .claude/tmp/review-telemetry.json 2>/dev/null)
if [[ -n "$finding_ids" ]]; then
    echo "$finding_ids" > "$tickets_dir/.review-findings-$ticket_id"
fi
```

2. Update Phase 8 (Completion) to log outcomes:

```bash
# If code review was run and ticket is completing, mark findings as fixed
if [[ -f "$tickets_dir/.review-findings-$ticket_id" ]]; then
    commit_hash=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
    while read finding_id; do
        goyoke-update-review-outcome \
            --finding-id="$finding_id" \
            --resolution="fixed" \
            --ticket-id="$ticket_id" \
            --commit="$commit_hash"
    done < "$tickets_dir/.review-findings-$ticket_id"
    rm "$tickets_dir/.review-findings-$ticket_id"
fi
```

3. This requires a new binary: `goyoke-update-review-outcome` (see separate task)

**Purpose**: Links review findings to their resolution, enabling measurement of fix rates and resolution times.
